name: ixys
description: IXYS Corporation is a global leader in power semiconductors and integrated circuits for power conversion and motion control applications. The company specializes in high-performance power MOSFETs, IGBTs, thyristors, rectifiers, and power ICs serving industrial, medical, transportation, and renewable energy markets.
longDescription: Founded in 1983 and now part of Littelfuse, IXYS Corporation is a pioneer in power semiconductor technology. The company offers a comprehensive portfolio of power discrete devices, power modules, and power ICs designed for high-efficiency power conversion. IXYS is particularly renowned for its expertise in high-voltage power semiconductors, RF power devices, and solid-state relays. With manufacturing facilities worldwide and a strong focus on innovation, IXYS serves customers in industrial automation, medical equipment, electric vehicles, renewable energy, and telecommunications markets. The company's products are known for their reliability, performance, and ability to operate in harsh environments.

coreProducts.name: Power MOSFETs
coreProducts.description: High-performance power MOSFETs for switching applications

coreProducts.name: IGBTs
coreProducts.description: Insulated Gate Bipolar Transistors for high-power applications

coreProducts.name: Power Modules
coreProducts.description: Integrated power modules for motor drives and inverters

seoTitle: IXYS Corporation | Power Semiconductors, MOSFETs, IGBTs | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of IXYS power semiconductors including MOSFETs, IGBTs, thyristors, and power modules. Technical support and competitive pricing.

faqs.question: What is IXYS Corporation's core expertise?
faqs.answer: IXYS Corporation specializes in: (1) Power semiconductors - High-voltage power MOSFETs, IGBTs, thyristors, and rectifiers. (2) RF power devices - For broadcast and communications applications. (3) Solid-state relays - For industrial control and switching. (4) Power ICs - Integrated power management solutions. (5) High reliability - Products designed for harsh environments. (6) Custom solutions - Application-specific power semiconductor designs. The company is particularly known for high-voltage capabilities up to 4500V.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for IXYS product selection guidance based on your voltage and current requirements.

faqs.question: What industries does IXYS serve?
faqs.answer: IXYS serves diverse industries: (1) Industrial automation - Motor drives, power supplies, welding equipment. (2) Medical - Imaging equipment, surgical tools, patient monitoring. (3) Transportation - Electric vehicles, rail systems, marine applications. (4) Renewable energy - Solar inverters, wind power systems. (5) Telecommunications - Base stations, power amplifiers. (6) Aerospace and defense - Satellites, radar systems, military equipment. (7) Consumer appliances - High-efficiency power conversion. IXYS products are designed to meet stringent industry standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: IXYS has solutions for your industry; browse products by application or contact FAE.

faqs.question: What is the relationship between IXYS and Littelfuse?
faqs.answer: IXYS became part of Littelfuse in 2018: (1) Acquisition - Littelfuse acquired IXYS to expand power semiconductor portfolio. (2) Product integration - IXYS products complement Littelfuse circuit protection. (3) Brand continuity - IXYS brand and product lines continue. (4) Combined expertise - Leveraging both companies' technical strengths. (5) Global reach - Enhanced distribution and support network. (6) Innovation - Continued investment in power semiconductor R&D. Customers benefit from the combined product portfolio and technical resources of both companies.
faqs.decisionGuide: IXYS products are available through Littelfuse distribution channels with full technical support.

faqs.question: What voltage ratings are available for IXYS power devices?
faqs.answer: IXYS offers wide voltage ranges: (1) Power MOSFETs - 40V to 1500V. (2) IGBTs - 600V to 1700V. (3) Thyristors - 600V to 4500V. (4) Rectifiers - 200V to 4500V. (5) RF power devices - Various ratings for broadcast applications. (6) Custom devices - Higher voltages available for specific applications. The company's expertise in high-voltage technology makes it a preferred supplier for demanding applications requiring 1200V and above.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use parametric search to find devices by voltage rating; contact FAE for high-voltage requirements above 1700V.

faqs.question: Does IXYS offer custom power semiconductor solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, IXYS provides custom solutions: (1) Custom voltage ratings - Devices optimized for specific voltage requirements. (2) Custom packages - Specialized packaging for unique applications. (3) Multi-chip modules - Integrated solutions with multiple die. (4) Application-specific designs - Optimized for specific topologies. (5) High reliability - Enhanced screening for military/aerospace. (6) Volume production - Scalable from prototypes to high volume. Contact IXYS/Littelfuse directly for custom device development programs.
faqs.decisionGuide: For custom requirements, contact our FAE team to discuss your specific needs with IXYS engineering.

faqs.question: What technical support is available for IXYS products?
faqs.answer: Comprehensive technical support includes: (1) Application notes - Detailed design guides for various applications. (2) Spice models - Simulation models for circuit design. (3) Thermal calculators - Tools for thermal management design. (4) Reference designs - Proven circuit topologies. (5) FAE support - Direct access to field application engineers. (6) Evaluation kits - Hardware for product evaluation. (7) Online resources - Datasheets, selection guides, and FAQs. LiTong Electronics provides local technical support backed by IXYS/Littelfuse engineering resources.
faqs.decisionGuide: Access online resources 24/7; contact LiTong FAE team for personalized technical support.
